title: Airy Vaulting Squall: dedicated curation bootstrap
body: Dedicated knowledge-curation pass starting under bootstrap fast-path: active-claims registry has no other agents present and no live commit intents. Intended scope: napkin line-width remediation, repo-continuity hard-pressure archive/split, pending-graduation and capture-buffer inventory, and closeout proof toward soft-only fitness with buffers empty or explicitly owner-gated. Mode: dedicated-knowledge-curation.
